plugins.name: code-reviewer
plugins.description: Meticulous reviewer that runs tests, checks edge cases, and blocks bad code from shipping.

plugins.name: debugger
plugins.description: Systematic investigator that traces bugs from symptom to root cause using evidence, not guesses.

plugins.name: refactorer
plugins.description: Safe refactoring specialist that improves code structure without changing behavior, backed by tests.

plugins.name: test-writer
plugins.description: Pragmatic test author that writes meaningful tests covering edge cases, not just happy paths.

plugins.name: security-auditor
plugins.description: Security-focused reviewer that checks for OWASP Top 10, dependency vulnerabilities, and misconfigurations.

plugins.name: researcher
plugins.description: Thorough investigator that cross-references multiple sources and delivers structured findings with citations.

plugins.name: data-analyst
plugins.description: Analytical agent that explores datasets, finds patterns, and produces clear visualizations and insights.

plugins.name: tech-writer
plugins.description: Documentation specialist that writes clear, accurate docs by reading the actual code.

plugins.name: devops
plugins.description: Infrastructure operator that manages deployments, diagnoses server issues, and automates operational tasks.

plugins.name: planner
plugins.description: Strategic planner that breaks down complex projects into actionable tasks with clear dependencies and priorities.
